name: 🌐 Global View
description: Full e-commerce platform overview with all components and connections

name: 🛒 Purchase Flow
description: Complete journey from 'Add to Cart' through payment to order confirmation

steps.description: Customer clicks 'Add to Cart' — request flows through ELB to API Gateway
Product service verifies availability and current price from cache/DynamoDB
Customer proceeds to checkout — Order service begins the purchase saga
Order service reserves inventory and processes payment via DynamoDB transactions
Order confirmation event published to SQS/SNS for downstream processing
Purchase event feeds recommendation engine to update 'Frequently Bought Together'

name: 🔍 Search & Discovery
description: How product search, autocomplete, and personalized recommendations work together

steps.description: User types search query — request hits API Gateway via ELB
Search service processes query with ML ranking, checks cache for frequent queries
On cache miss, search engine queries distributed index backed by DynamoDB
Product service enriches search results with real-time pricing and availability
Recommendation engine injects personalized suggestions based on browsing history
